scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter server lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter web format && pnpm --filter server format
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter server test
